1.description: Distribution of the share of liquidity that individuals reinvest after a forced sale event within 30 days in response to a loss (left side) or a gain (right side) relative to their initial investment. Observations from raw data for our sample.

2.description: Share of liquidity that individuals reinvest after a forced sale event within 30 days relative to the simple arithmetic return (relative to the FIFO cost basis) of their individual fund investment. Raw data binned averages and standard deviations include all observations (left side) or observations with individual fund returns within±$\pm$25% (right side).

3.description: Number of mutual fund closures, as identified by the International Securities Identification Number (ISIN), each year over the 2006 to 2016 period. Raw data on all fund closures obtained from BVI.

4.description: Number of forced sale events, that is, the number of observed retail investors per year affected by fund closures over the 2006 to 2016 period. Observations from raw sample data.

5.description: Average amounts received from the forced sale events per year over the 2006 to 2016 period. Observations from raw sample data.

6.description: Left (right) side: Fraction of gain (loss) liquidations on each of the 180 calendar days before the fund closure relative to the total number of gain (loss) liquidations in the affected funds. Observations are obtained from the raw sample data, with the closure date containing all sales on or after the closure date and funds restricted to those resulting in at least one forced sale.

7.description: T-test results for equality between the share of forced gain (or loss) realizations relative to all realizations (forced or endogenous). T-test results for testing whether, by ISIN, the means between the fraction of gain (loss) realizations relative to all realizations are equal.

8.description: Sales receipt received by mail showing the purchase price (Ausführungswert), sale price (Kurswert), and absolute capital loss (Veräußerungsverlust).

9.description: Share of liquidity individuals reinvest after the forced sale event within 30 days relative to the simple arithmetic return of their individual fund investment (relative to the investment's FIFO cost basis). Results are based on the raw data of individuals who invested in the fund only once such that the FIFO cost basis equals the purchase price (left side) and observations with fund returns within±$\pm$25% to enhance visibility (right side).
